title: Earnings Preview: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (CURLF) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Curaleaf Holdings is set to report Q4 2025 results on February 26, 2026. Wall Street anticipates disappointing performance, with analysts forecasting a per-share loss of $0.08, representing a significant year-over-year decline. Revenue is expected to fall 1% to approximately $327.84 million. The analysis indicates bearish sentiment among analysts, with recent estimate revisions trending downward. The company carries a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) and an Earnings Surprise Prediction of -3.23%, suggesting limited potential for a positive earnings surprise. Historical performance offers some perspective: In the prior quarter, Curaleaf exceeded expectations by delivering a loss of $0.06 versus the projected $0.07. Over the past four quarters, the company has beaten consensus estimates three times, indicating occasional capacity to surprise positively. While earnings beats typically support stock performance, other factors can drive price movements independently of reported results.
